steps.title: Use the blended examples
steps.content: The examples show artists combining Indigenous musical elements with electronic music and rock. The blank must describe refusing to keep Indigenous music and other styles in separate categories.

steps.title: Choose boundary refusal
steps.content: A would mean concealing distinctions, but the Indigenous elements remain prominent. C would mean substituting one thing for another. D would mean noticing or maintaining distinctions. The remaining word means refusing to accept the separation. The answer is B.
